## Components

Repeat the section below for EVERY component identified in the codebase.
A component is any distinct, cohesive unit: a service, module, app layer, library, worker, API gateway, CLI tool, etc.
Do not include databases or data stores as components — those are documented in data-model.md.
Do not assume a fixed set of components — discover them from the code.
